name: Silicone Toy - Hedgehog Stacker - Cloud Island™
description:
Keep them engaged and entertained for hours with this Silicone Hedgehog Stacker Toy from cloud island™. The toy features a wooden hedgehog with silicone stackers to stimulate your little one's senses and imagination. This hedgehog stacker toy makes a great gift for baby showers, first birthday parties or any other occasion.

cloud island™: Designed with love. Made without compromise.
